titles: "세종을 만든 건 칼이었다" 이성계 시리즈 EP05 — 태종의 15년
"아내의 형제까지 죽였다" 이성계 시리즈 EP05 — 태종 이방원의 치세
"킬방원의 설계도" 이성계 시리즈 EP05 — 태종의 15년 숙청

image_concepts.A: 장기판 위의 왕 — 조선 궁궐을 내려다보는 이방원의 뒷모습, 아래에 장기판처럼 배열된 공신·외척 말들
image_concepts.B: 두 왕의 대비 — 좌측 피 묻은 태종, 우측 밝은 빛 속 세종의 실루엣

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A 실사. 곤룡포를 입은 이방원이 높은 곳에서 조선 궁궐을 내려다보는 뒷모습. 아래에 장기판처럼 배열된 조선 관리들의 작은 실루엣. 밝은 금빛 궁궐 지붕과 따뜻한 석양빛이 스케일 대비를 만든다.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic wide shot of a Korean king (Lee Bang-won, Joseon dynasty) seen from behind, wearing a dark blue-gold dragon robe (gonryongpo) and a black winged cap (ikseongwan), standing on an elevated stone terrace overlooking a vast Joseon palace complex below. Far below him, tiny silhouettes of court officials are arranged like pieces on a janggi (Korean chess) board on the palace courtyard. Bright golden sunset light illuminates the traditional tiled palace roofs with warm amber glow, creating a dramatic scale contrast between the towering king and the small figures below. Vivid saturated colors with high contrast, bright dramatic atmosphere. In the upper-right area, a bold Korean Hangul headline reads '15년의 설계도' in a clean heavy condensed sans-serif typeface, set in pure ivory white #FFFFFF with a thick deep navy gold-trimmed drop shadow, sized prominently for thumbnail readability with at least 12% margin from the top and right edges. Every Hangul syllable and digit is drawn complete with all strokes fully visible. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A 변형. 위에서 내려다본 조선 궁궐 대전, 바닥에 거대한 장기판이 그려져 있고 그 위에 관리들이 말처럼 서 있다. 중앙에 왕의 그림자가 길게 드리워진다.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic aerial view looking down at a grand Joseon palace throne hall courtyard. The stone floor has a massive janggi (Korean chess) board pattern painted on it, with real Joseon court officials in colorful ceremonial robes standing on the grid like game pieces. A single long shadow of a king stretches across the board from the upper edge. Bright warm golden-hour sunlight floods the scene from a low angle, creating vivid long shadows and rich saturated colors on the traditional architecture. High contrast cinematic atmosphere with vibrant tones. In the upper-center area, a bold Korean Hangul headline reads '피의 장기판' in a clean heavy condensed sans-serif typeface, set in pure ivory white #FFFFFF with a thick deep crimson red drop shadow, sized prominently for thumbnail readability with at least 12% margin from the top edge. Every Hangul syllable is drawn complete with all strokes fully visible. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 B 실사. 좌측에 피 묻은 칼을 든 태종(어두운 붉은 톤), 우측에 책을 든 세종(밝은 황금빛 톤). 좌우 분할 대비 구도로 '피의 왕'이 '학문의 왕'을 만들었다는 역설을 시각화.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic split-composition photograph. Left half: a stern Korean king (Taejong, late 40s) in a dark crimson dragon robe, holding a blood-stained sword, lit by intense warm red-orange firelight, expression cold and resolute. Right half: a younger Korean king (Sejong, early 30s) in a bright golden dragon robe, holding an open book, bathed in brilliant warm golden sunlight with a serene wise expression. The two halves meet at the center with a sharp contrast line. Bright vivid saturated colors with high contrast between the red-toned left and golden-toned right sides. Dramatic cinematic atmosphere. In the upper-center area between the two kings, a bold Korean Hangul headline reads '킬방원 vs 세종' in a clean heavy condensed sans-serif typeface, set in pure ivory white #FFFFFF with a thick deep crimson red drop shadow that bridges the red and golden halves, sized prominently for thumbnail readability with at least 12% margin from the top edge. Every Hangul syllable is drawn complete with all strokes fully visible. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 B 변형. 조선 왕좌 위에 두 개의 왕관이 놓여 있다. 하나는 핏자국이 묻어 있고(태종), 하나는 깨끗하고 빛나는(세종). 왕좌 뒤 밝은 조명.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic close-up of a Joseon dynasty golden throne (eojwa). Two traditional Korean king crowns (ikseongwan) rest on the throne seat. The left crown has vivid red blood stains dripping down its dark fabric. The right crown is pristine, gleaming under bright warm golden light. The ornate throne behind is brightly lit with rich warm amber tones, detailed dragon carvings visible. Bright vivid colors with high contrast between the blood-stained and pristine crowns. Bright cinematic atmosphere with saturated warm tones. In the upper-center area, a bold Korean Hangul headline reads '두 왕관' in a clean heavy condensed sans-serif typeface, set in pure ivory white #FFFFFF with a thick deep crimson red drop shadow, sized prominently for thumbnail readability with at least 12% margin from the top edge. Every Hangul syllable is drawn complete with all strokes fully visible. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 와일드카드. 피 묻은 칼이 조선 지도 위에 꽂혀 있고, 칼날에 세종대왕의 실루엣이 반사되는 이미지. 칼(폭력)이 세종(평화)을 비추는 역설.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic photograph of a blood-stained Korean traditional sword (geom) stuck vertically into an ancient Joseon dynasty map spread on a wooden table. The polished blade reflects a bright golden silhouette of King Sejong the Great wearing royal robes. Warm bright amber light illuminates the scene from behind, creating a vivid glow around the reflected silhouette. The map shows detailed Korean peninsula geography with classical Chinese characters. Rich saturated colors with high contrast between the dark red blood on the blade and the bright golden reflection. Dramatic cinematic atmosphere. In the upper-right area, a bold Korean Hangul headline reads '칼이 만든 왕' in a clean heavy condensed sans-serif typeface, set in pure ivory white #FFFFFF with a thick deep crimson red drop shadow, sized prominently for thumbnail readability with at least 12% margin from the top and right edges. Every Hangul syllable is drawn complete with all strokes fully visible. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.
